description:
Multi-line instructions use different indentation than DSPy.

**Problem:**
DSRs (chat.rs:151):
  format!('In adhering to this structure, your objective is:\n\t{instruction}')
  Uses single tab

DSPy (chat_adapter.py:141-143):
  objective = ('\n' + ' ' * 8).join([''] + instructions.splitlines())
  return f'In adhering to this structure, your objective is: {objective}'
  Uses 8-space indentation for continuation lines, objective on same line

**Fix:** Update format_task_description() to use 8-space indentation and match DSPy's exact format.

**Refs:**
- DSRs: crates/dspy-rs/src/adapter/chat.rs:126-152 (format_task_description)
- DSPy: dspy/adapters/chat_adapter.py:140-143 (format_task_description)
title: ChatAdapter: Match DSPy instruction indentation (8 spaces)
